seo_metadata.name: Cornerstone on Arum - Luxury Apartments
seo_metadata.description: Premium residential living in Table View. 8 new residential apartments. Available units: 101, 201, 203, 204, 205, 302, 303, 304.

knowledge_base.question: What is Cornerstone on Arum?
knowledge_base.answer: A modern residential development at 154 Arum Road, Table View, Cape Town. Developed by Igneous Property Development, it is approximately 2.3 km to the beach and close to the MyCiTi Table View stop.

knowledge_base.question: What are the design and structural features?
knowledge_base.answer: Smart layouts maximise space and natural light, paired with premium finishes such as timber-look vinyl flooring, engineered stone countertops, and soft-close cabinetry. Built with a full reinforced concrete frame, every apartment delivers structural integrity, acoustic comfort, and reduced long-term maintenance.

knowledge_base.question: What is the location and local advantage?
knowledge_base.answer: Positioned in Table View, Cornerstone on Arum is close to beaches, shopping centres, restaurants, top-tier schools, medical facilities, and the MyCiTi transport network. It combines a coastal lifestyle with everyday convenience.

knowledge_base.question: What is the price range for units?
knowledge_base.answer: 1-bedroom units (101, 201, 203, 204, 205) are priced at R1,700,000. The 2-bedroom loft units (302, 303, 304) are R2,725,000.

knowledge_base.question: Which units are sold or available?
knowledge_base.answer: There are currently 8 units available: 101, 201, 203, 204, 205, 302, 303, and 304. Other units have been sold. A R5,000 deposit secures your unit. Contact Grant Whitburn on 072 450 3626 immediately.

knowledge_base.question: What is a 72-hour clause?
knowledge_base.answer: A 72-hour clause applies to units with suspensive offers. However, all currently available units (101, 201, 203, 204, 205, 302, 303, 304) are fully available with no current 72-hour restrictions.

knowledge_base.question: Which specific units have a 72-hour clause?
knowledge_base.answer: The remaining available units (101, 201, 203, 204, 205, 302, 303, and 304) are fully available with no current clause restrictions.

knowledge_base.question: What are the floor levels and sizes of the units?
knowledge_base.answer: Remaining units: 101 (47m²), 201 (47m²), 203 (45m²), 204 (48m²), 205 (48m²), 302 (77m²), 303 (77m²), 304 (77m²). Sizes include internal area plus balcony. All units include 1 dedicated parking bay.

knowledge_base.question: What deposit is required?
knowledge_base.answer: A R5,000 reservation deposit is payable within 7 days of Offer to Purchase signature. This applies to both cash and bond buyers.

knowledge_base.question: How long is the bond approval window?
knowledge_base.answer: 30 days from Offer to Purchase signature.

knowledge_base.question: When do transfers start and when is completion?
knowledge_base.answer: Transfers commence approximately 60 days before completion. The development is completed and available for immediate occupation. Transfer costs are payable by the Purchaser.

knowledge_base.question: What type of flooring is used?
knowledge_base.answer: Living areas and bedrooms feature premium timber-look vinyl flooring. Bathrooms and balconies use slip-resistant ceramic tiles.

knowledge_base.question: What are the kitchen finishes and appliances?
knowledge_base.answer: Kitchens include engineered stone countertops and soft-close cabinetry. Appliances are Defy Black Range: Gas Hob, Slimline Undercounter Oven, and Extractor Hood.

knowledge_base.question: What tech and utilities are provided?
knowledge_base.answer: Fibre ready, smart prepaid meters, and a centralised heat pump system (saving up to 40% on hot water). Battery backup for common areas and security.

knowledge_base.question: What security features does the building have?
knowledge_base.answer: Access control, 24/7 off-site CCTV monitoring with armed response, and secure perimeter fencing. Note: There is no lift in the building.

knowledge_base.question: Are pets allowed?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, small pets are allowed subject to Body Corporate approval.

knowledge_base.question: Is short-term letting or Airbnb allowed?
knowledge_base.answer: Short-term letting is discouraged. The minimum lease period allowed is 6 consecutive months.

knowledge_base.question: What is the parking situation?
knowledge_base.answer: All units have 1 dedicated parking bay. Residents must park in their allocated bays only.

knowledge_base.question: Who do I contact for sales or enquiries?
